zh.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Louvain於1345年3月27日出生在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓時，她的父親John Louvain26歲，母親Margaret Weston22歲。她於1359年與Sir William Bourchier結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1397年10月5日在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

zh-hans.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Louvain于1345年3月27日出生在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓时，她的父亲John Louvain26岁，母亲Margaret Weston22岁。她于1359年与Sir William Bourchier结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1397年10月5日在她的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Louvain was born on 27 March 1345, in Little Easton, Essex, England, her father, John Louvain, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Weston, was 22. She married Sir William Bourchier in 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 5 October 1397, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Little Easton, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Louvain est née le 27 mars 1345, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Louvain, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Weston, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Bourchier en 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1397, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Louvain am 27. März 1345 in Little Easton, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Louvain 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Weston 22. Sie hat 1359 Sir William Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1397 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Little Easton, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Louvain è nata il il 27 marzo 1345 nel Little Easton, Essex, England, sua padre, John Louvain, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Weston, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Bourchier nel 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 5 ottobre 1397, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Little Easton, Essex, England.

ja.Little Easton, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスリットル エアストン
ja.Derby, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビー
ja.Weston, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン
ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Louvainが1345年3月27日にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで生まれた時，父John Louvainは26歳，母Margaret Westonは22歳であった。1359年にSir William Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1397年10月5日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスリットル エアストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Louvain(이)가 1345년 3월 27일 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Louvain(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Weston(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1359년 Sir William Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 10월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에 묻혔다.

mn.27 March 1345–5 October 1397: 1345 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 27–1397 оны Аравдугаар сарын 5

pt.27 March 1345–5 October 1397: 27 de março de 1345–5 de outubro de 1397
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Louvain nasceu em 27 de março de 1345, em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Louvain, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Weston, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Bourchier em 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1397, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Louvain родилась 27 марта 1345 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Louvain было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Weston, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Bourchier в 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 5 октября 1397 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия.

es.27 March 1345–5 October 1397: 27 de marzo de 1345–5 de octubre de 1397
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Louvain nació el 27 de marzo de 1345, en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Louvain, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Weston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William Bourchier en 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1397, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.
